app.name: Sample ggui — Mapbox gadget demo (public env channel)

exports.description: Render an interactive Mapbox GL map with style, pan/zoom controls, and marker support. Returns a container ref to attach to a <div>.
exports.usage: Mount when the intent names a rendered map. Pass `center: [lng, lat]` (Mapbox uses lng-first order) + `zoom: 2..22`. Default style is `mapbox://styles/mapbox/streets-v12`.
exports.gotchas: Mapbox requires the container <div> to have a non-zero height before the map mounts — apply `style={{ height: 400 }}` (or similar) directly. `center` is `[longitude, latitude]` (opposite of Leaflet's `[lat, lng]`). Operators must stamp `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN` on App.publicEnv before any contract using this hook can render.
